channel.title: Short-Story on xuanjin
channel.description: Recent content in Short-Story on xuanjin

item.title: Murder? Murder! Murder? Maybe - Part I
item.description: Photo by Rojan Maguyon on Pexels.com Story starts here… (If you prefer listening, please scroll all the way down) The plan was good and simple, he had it all planned out, it was just suppose to be a fake death, so that he doesn’t need to live the life he doesn’t want, and start over. His best friend would assist him. He would still watch his family from far away and send money to them once in a while to help out, that’s all he wanted to do; making everyone in the town thinks he is dead, then life moves on.

item.title: English
item.description: I was thinking about writing a short story, but for days, I don’t know what to write about. I cannot even start a story with a short story prompt, then why not start writing something about me? English is one of my favorite languages, I mean, Chinese is my other favorite, and don’t get me wrong, I do love my own culture and Chinese is a beautiful language, especially when you write things out.
